name: pr_cep_c_upd_win_live
_finding: CEP E2 item C §1a (D-139): external in-place UPDATE of a live WINDOWED-accumulate source event. count() has NO source binding ⇒ the windowed watch mask (bind_fields) is EMPTY ⇒ NO re-fire on any field update (here a no-op tag). Was xfail (engine re-folded → W2 W2 over-fire); the D-139 fix gates a windowed accumulate's source re-fold on bind_fields (bindings) instead of listen_mask (constraints∪bindings), so a constraint-field update is a mask-miss. engine==oracle: W2 once. Contrast pr_cep_c_win_sum_upd (sum($v) re-folds on a $v update).
drl: rule W2 when accumulate( E0(tag == "y") over window:time(200ms); $c : count() ) then end
